title: Energy Engineers, Except Wind and Solar
description: Design, develop, or evaluate energy-related projects or programs to reduce energy costs or improve energy efficiency during the designing, building, or remodeling stages of construction. May specialize in electrical systems; heating, ventilation, and air-conditioning (HVAC) systems; green buildings; lighting; air quality; or energy procurement.

tasks.text: Identify and recommend energy savings strategies to achieve more energy-efficient operation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct energy audits to evaluate energy use and to identify conservation and cost reduction measures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor and analyze energy consumption.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor energy related design or construction issues, such as energy engineering, energy management, or sustainable design.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect or monitor energy systems, including heating, ventilating, and air conditioning (HVAC) or daylighting systems to determine energy use or potential energy savings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Advise clients or colleagues on topics such as climate control systems, energy modeling, data logging, sustainable design, or energy auditing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze, interpret, or create graphical representations of energy data, using engineering software.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Verify energy bills and meter readings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect data for energy conservation analyses, using jobsite observation, field inspections, or sub-metering.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Manage the development, design, or construction of energy conservation projects to ensure acceptability of budgets and time lines, conformance to federal and state laws, or adherence to approved specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform energy modeling, measurement, verification, commissioning, or retro-commissioning.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review architectural, mechanical, or electrical plans or specifications to evaluate energy efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare energy-related project reports or related documentation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Review or negotiate energy purchase agreements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train personnel or clients on topics such as energy management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct the implementation of energy management projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research renewable or alternative energy systems or technologies, such as solar thermal or photovoltaic energy.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Promote awareness or use of alternative or renewable energy sources.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write or install energy management routines for building automation systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend best fuel for specific sites or circumstances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult with construction or renovation clients or other engineers on topics such as Leadership in Energy and Environmental Design (LEED) or Green Buildings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
